summary: Adopt two build practices from YanWenKun/ComfyUI-Docker: (1) RUN --quick-test-for-ci --cpu after the node bake so an import failure fails the BUILD (the MPI-149 kornia/LTXVideo class that shipped and died live as Node Stage1_Bypass not found; also automates the hand-run '8 nodes register' gate from MPI-139); (2) pip constraints file pinning the cu130 trio so torch drift is unresolvable, with the MPI-244 assert kept as the belt. Blocked on MPI-340 - build to the dev tag, never rebuild released v0.16.0.

todo -> doing. Dockerfile guards landed in mpi-ci/cubric-vision-pod/Dockerfile: (1) node-import smoke test after the MPI-244 assert - runs main.py --quick-test-for-ci --cpu to a log file and GREPS for IMPORT FAILED, because the flag does a plain exit(0) and custom-node import failures are only logged (verified in upstream main.py at v0.27.0 and v0.28.0); the brief's bare RUN would have been vacuously green. (2) constraints file generated from pip list right after the cu130 trio install + ENV PIP_CONSTRAINT=/opt/constraints.txt, so the node bake, the kornia pin and the wrapper's runtime installs cannot resolve a non-cu130 torch; MPI-244 assert kept. Docs section added to docs/builder/02-image-and-rebuild.md. NOT yet built - the dev-tag CI dispatch rides with MPI-342, and the unpin-kornia proof that the smoke test bites is still outstanding.

Session close-out: card stays in doing. Dockerfile guards are committed but NOT built - all four verify items (smoke layer passes, unpin-kornia proof, +cu130 plus constraints.txt in the final image, one LTX gen) need the dev-tag build, which is user-authorized and bundled into MPI-342's single dispatch.

Check 1 PASSES: the node-import smoke layer printed 'node-import smoke test OK' on the clean v0.17.0-dev-cu130 build (ComfyUI 0.28, mpi-ci run 29998306717, 19m3s), all 7 baked pip-req packs installed, released v0.16.0 untouched. But the FIRST dispatch exposed a real bug in this card's other guard: PIP_CONSTRAINT pins torch by LOCAL version (2.12.0+cu130), which exists only on the pytorch index, while --index-url was passed to exactly one pip call. comfyui-impact-pack requires git+sam2, whose pyproject build-system.requires includes torch>=2.5.1, so pip resolves it in a PEP-517 isolated build env that inherits the constraint but not the index -> ResolutionImpossible. Fixed in mpi-ci 16354e5 with ENV PIP_EXTRA_INDEX_URL for the cu130 index; ENV so it also covers the wrapper's runtime connect-time installs, which had the same latent break.

Check 3 DONE, on the pulled final image v0.17.0-dev-cu130 (sha256:80351c10) not on build logs: pip list shows torch 2.12.0+cu130 / torchaudio 2.11.0+cu130 / torchvision 0.27.0+cu130, /opt/constraints.txt holds exactly those three lines, PIP_CONSTRAINT and PIP_EXTRA_INDEX_URL are both set in the image env so the guard is live at runtime, and import torch reports 2.12.0+cu130 cuda 13.0. Two of four checks now done (1 and 3). Left: check 2 (unpin kornia, rebuild, must FAIL at the smoke layer) and check 4 (one LTX gen on a dev Pod, user-gated).

Check 4 DONE - one LTX gen on the dev Pod. LTX 2.3 High i2v_ms on v0.17.0-dev-cu130 (RTX 4090, ComfyUI 0.28): 'Prompt executed in 159.93 seconds', MpiVideo_00001.mp4 served, gallery card i2v_ms_001 512x960 2m 40s. ComfyUI-LTXVideo - the pack the kornia 0.8.3 trap breaks - both imports at build (smoke layer) and generates on hardware. Three of four checks now done (1, 3, 4); only check 2 remains, the deliberate unpin-kornia rebuild that must FAIL at the smoke layer.

Check 2 (unpin-kornia proof) DONE - the smoke test gate BITES. Proof run 30028617382, cu130, throwaway branch/tag. Whole kornia RUN disabled -> unpinned kornia 0.8.3 -> RED at smoke layer [11/22]: IMPORT FAILED ComfyUI-LTXVideo, build stops, exit 1. cpu leg green (no baked nodes). Branch deleted, never merged; pin intact on main. All four MPI-341 checks now complete.

maturity in-progress -> validating, attention cleared. All four verify items done (smoke green on clean build, unpin-kornia proof RED at smoke layer, +cu130 trio + constraints.txt on final image, one LTX gen on dev Pod). Ready for done pending explicit user approval.
Pod build hardening COMPLETE, user-approved for done. All 4 checks green incl. the unpin-kornia proof the smoke gate bites (run 30028617382).
